IBAN.message: Invalid IBAN format. Must start with a 2-letter country code followed by digits and characters.

LEI.message: Invalid LEI format. Must be 20 characters (18 alphanumeric + 2 digits).

Currency.message: Invalid Currency code. Must be 3 uppercase letters (e.g., USD, EUR).

Country.message: Invalid Country code. Must be 2 uppercase letters (e.g., US, GB).

Amount.message: Invalid Amount. Use up to 13 digits and 5 decimal places (e.g., 1234.56).

Date.message: Invalid Date. Format must be YYYY-MM-DD.

DateTime.message: Invalid Timestamp. Format must be ISO 8601 (e.g., 2023-10-27T10:00:00Z).

Max35Text.message: Field exceeds maximum length of 35 characters.

Max140Text.message: Field exceeds maximum length of 140 characters.

Numeric15.message: Must be a numeric value up to 15 digits.
